name: PEPSICO INC
summary: PepsiCo is a leading global beverage and convenient food company incorporated in Delaware in 1919. It makes, markets, distributes and sells products under brands including Lays, Doritos, Cheetos, Gatorade, Pepsi-Cola, Mountain Dew, Quaker and SodaStream. Operating through six segments, PepsiCo serves customers and consumers in more than 200 countries and territories via direct-store-delivery, customer warehouse, distributor networks, and e-commerce platforms.

products.name: Pepsi-Cola
products.description: Flagship carbonated soft drink sold as concentrate, fountain syrup, and finished goods globally.

products.name: Gatorade / Gatorade Zero
products.description: Sports hydration beverages sold in North America and internationally.

products.name: Mountain Dew
products.description: Carbonated soft drink brand including Diet, Baja Blast, Zero Sugar and Code Red variants.

products.name: Lays
products.description: Potato chip brand sold globally across multiple segments.

products.name: Doritos
products.description: Flavored tortilla chip brand sold globally across multiple segments.

products.name: Cheetos
products.description: Cheese-flavored snack brand sold globally across multiple segments.

products.name: Quaker
products.description: Food brand covering cereals, oatmeal, granola bars and other grain-based products.

products.name: SodaStream
products.description: Sparkling water maker devices and related products sold through IB Franchise segment.

products.name: Aquafina
products.description: Bottled water brand sold in North America and internationally.

products.name: Bubly
products.description: Sparkling water brand sold in North America.

products.name: Sabra
products.description: Refrigerated dips and spreads brand, became wholly-owned subsidiary in December 2024.

products.name: Rockstar Energy
products.description: Energy drink brand owned by PepsiCo outside the United States and Canada; distributed in certain U.S./Canada channels.

products.name: Muscle Milk
products.description: Protein beverage brand sold under PepsiCo trademark.

products.name: Lipton Ready-to-Drink Tea
products.description: Ready-to-drink tea products sold through joint ventures with Unilever in North America and internationally.

products.name: Starbucks Ready-to-Drink Coffee
products.description: Ready-to-drink coffee products sold through a joint venture with Starbucks in North America.

partnerships.description: Joint ventures for ready-to-drink Lipton tea products in North America and internationally.
Joint venture to make, market, distribute and sell ready-to-drink coffee products in North America.
PepsiCo manufactures and distributes Crush, Dr Pepper and Schweppes under license in certain U.S./Canada markets.
PepsiCo licenses certain juice brands from Dole for distribution.
PepsiCo holds a long-term license to use the Ocean Spray trademark in connection with its products.
PBNA distributes Celsius, Alani Nu and Rockstar energy drink brands in certain U.S./Canada channels.
PepsiCo acts as exclusive distributor for TBG brands for small-format and foodservice customers with chilled DSD in the U.S.
PepsiCo acquired Strauss Group's 50% ownership in Sabra Dipping Company in December 2024, making Sabra wholly-owned.
